mapper.select:
SELECT t.year AS year, t.achievementType AS achievementType, SUM(t.cnt) AS count FROM ( SELECT CAST(p.publish_year AS SIGNED) AS year, 'paper' AS achievementType, COUNT(*) AS cnt, p.dept_id FROM paper p WHERE p.status NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'INVALIDATED')
GROUP BY CAST(p.publish_year AS SIGNED), p.dept_id
UNION ALL
SELECT YEAR(pat.application_date) AS year, 'patent' AS achievementType, COUNT(*) AS cnt, pat.dept_id FROM patent pat WHERE pat.status NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'INVALIDATED')
GROUP BY YEAR(pat.application_date), pat.dept_id
UNION ALL
SELECT YEAR(sc.registration_date) AS year, 'software' AS achievementType, COUNT(*) AS cnt, sc.dept_id FROM software_copyright sc WHERE sc.status NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'INVALIDATED')
GROUP BY YEAR(sc.registration_date), sc.dept_id ) t
AND t.year >= #{yearFrom}
AND t.year <= #{yearTo}
GROUP BY t.year, t.achievementType ORDER BY t.year ASC

SELECT t.achievementType AS achievementType, SUM(t.cnt) AS count FROM ( SELECT 'paper' AS achievementType, COUNT(*) AS cnt, p.dept_id FROM paper p WHERE p.status NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'INVALIDATED')
GROUP BY p.dept_id
UNION ALL
SELECT 'patent' AS achievementType, COUNT(*) AS cnt, pat.dept_id FROM patent pat WHERE pat.status NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'INVALIDATED')
GROUP BY pat.dept_id
UNION ALL
SELECT 'software' AS achievementType, COUNT(*) AS cnt, sc.dept_id FROM software_copyright sc WHERE sc.status NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'INVALIDATED')
GROUP BY sc.dept_id ) t GROUP BY t.achievementType ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT sd.dept_name AS deptName, t.dept_id AS deptId, COALESCE(SUM(t.paperCount), 0) AS paperCount, COALESCE(SUM(t.patentCount), 0) AS patentCount, COALESCE(SUM(t.softwareCount), 0) AS softwareCount, COALESCE(SUM(t.paperCount + t.patentCount + t.softwareCount), 0) AS totalCount FROM ( SELECT p.dept_id, COUNT(*) AS paperCount, 0 AS patentCount, 0 AS softwareCount FROM paper p WHERE p.status NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'INVALIDATED')
GROUP BY p.dept_id
UNION ALL
SELECT pat.dept_id, 0 AS paperCount, COUNT(*) AS patentCount, 0 AS softwareCount FROM patent pat WHERE pat.status NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'INVALIDATED')
GROUP BY pat.dept_id
UNION ALL
SELECT sc.dept_id, 0 AS paperCount, 0 AS patentCount, COUNT(*) AS softwareCount FROM software_copyright sc WHERE sc.status NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'INVALIDATED')
GROUP BY sc.dept_id ) t LEFT JOIN sys_department sd ON t.dept_id = sd.id GROUP BY t.dept_id, sd.dept_name ORDER BY totalCount DESC

choose.when:
SELECT CAST(t.year AS CHAR) AS year, t.achievementType AS achievementType, SUM(t.cnt) AS count, '' AS deptName, '' AS status, '' AS percentage FROM ( SELECT CAST(p.publish_year AS SIGNED) AS year, 'paper' AS achievementType, COUNT(*) AS cnt, p.dept_id FROM paper p WHERE p.status NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'INVALIDATED')
GROUP BY CAST(p.publish_year AS SIGNED), p.dept_id
UNION ALL
SELECT YEAR(pat.application_date) AS year, 'patent' AS achievementType, COUNT(*) AS cnt, pat.dept_id FROM patent pat WHERE pat.status NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'INVALIDATED')
GROUP BY YEAR(pat.application_date), pat.dept_id
UNION ALL
SELECT YEAR(sc.registration_date) AS year, 'software' AS achievementType, COUNT(*) AS cnt, sc.dept_id FROM software_copyright sc WHERE sc.status NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'INVALIDATED')
GROUP BY YEAR(sc.registration_date), sc.dept_id ) t GROUP BY t.year, t.achievementType ORDER BY t.year ASC

SELECT '' AS year, t.achievementType AS achievementType, SUM(t.cnt) AS count, '' AS deptName, '' AS status, '' AS percentage FROM ( SELECT 'paper' AS achievementType, COUNT(*) AS cnt, p.dept_id FROM paper p WHERE p.status NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'INVALIDATED')
GROUP BY p.dept_id
UNION ALL
SELECT 'patent' AS achievementType, COUNT(*) AS cnt, pat.dept_id FROM patent pat WHERE pat.status NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'INVALIDATED')
GROUP BY pat.dept_id
UNION ALL
SELECT 'software' AS achievementType, COUNT(*) AS cnt, sc.dept_id FROM software_copyright sc WHERE sc.status NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'INVALIDATED')
GROUP BY sc.dept_id ) t GROUP BY t.achievementType ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT '' AS year, '' AS achievementType, COALESCE(SUM(t.paperCount + t.patentCount + t.softwareCount), 0) AS count, sd.dept_name AS deptName, '' AS status, '' AS percentage FROM ( SELECT p.dept_id, COUNT(*) AS paperCount, 0 AS patentCount, 0 AS softwareCount FROM paper p WHERE p.status NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'INVALIDATED')
GROUP BY p.dept_id
UNION ALL
SELECT pat.dept_id, 0 AS paperCount, COUNT(*) AS patentCount, 0 AS softwareCount FROM patent pat WHERE pat.status NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'INVALIDATED')
GROUP BY pat.dept_id
UNION ALL
SELECT sc.dept_id, 0 AS paperCount, 0 AS patentCount, COUNT(*) AS softwareCount FROM software_copyright sc WHERE sc.status NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'INVALIDATED')
GROUP BY sc.dept_id ) t LEFT JOIN sys_department sd ON t.dept_id = sd.id GROUP BY t.dept_id, sd.dept_name ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT '' AS year, '' AS achievementType, COUNT(*) AS count, '' AS deptName, CASE WHEN pat.legal_status = '授权' THEN 'VALID' WHEN pat.legal_status IN ('终止', '无效', '驳回') THEN 'INVALID' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS status, '' AS percentage FROM patent pat WHERE pat.status NOT IN ('DRAFT')
GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC
choose.otherwise: SELECT NULL AS year, NULL AS achievementType, NULL AS count, NULL AS deptName, NULL AS status, NULL AS percentage WHERE 1 = 0

mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0) AS totalUsers, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_department WHERE deleted = 0) AS totalDepts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role WHERE deleted = 0) AS totalRoles
